prompt.content: Which rotation carries the rectangle onto itself?

<svg viewBox='0 0 260 180' role='img' aria-label='A non-square rectangle centered on a point'><rect x='55' y='55' width='150' height='70' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='130' cy='90' r='3' fill='black'/><text x='137' y='95' font-size='14'>center</text></svg>

choices.content: A rotation by any angle about its center

steps.content: A non-square rectangle maps onto itself after a 180° rotation about its center. A 90° rotation would swap the longer and shorter side directions, so it would not match the original rectangle.
